description: Generate your daily standup from real GitHub, Jira, Linear, and Slack activity.
name: io.github.sathvic-kollu/standup-mcp

environmentVariables.description: GitHub read-only personal access token. Enables commits, PRs, and reviews. Leave all sources unset to use the built-in demo data.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Your Jira Cloud site, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Atlassian account email the API token belongs to.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Jira API token from id.atlassian.com. Read-only use.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Linear personal API key (read-only). Enables issue state changes and comments.
environmentVariables.name: LINEAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Slack token with read scopes. Enables scanning your own messages for blocker language.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated channel ids to scan when message search is unavailable.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_CHANNELS

environmentVariables.description: Optional display name for the standup's owner.
environmentVariables.name: STANDUP_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to force the demo dataset even when credentials are present.
environmentVariables.name: STANDUP_DEMO_MODE

title: Standup from your activity
